name: MPI-Leipzig Mind-Brain-Body (LEMON)
description: A cross-sectional mind-brain-body dataset from 228 healthy adults in two age groups (young, ~20-35; older, ~59-77) combining 3T MRI (resting-state fMRI, structural, diffusion), 62-channel resting EEG, and extensive cognition, emotion, and personality measures. Useful for studying emotional and social-affective traits and how they differ across healthy aging.
citation: Babayan A, Erbey M, Kumral D, et al. (2019). A mind-brain-body dataset of MRI, EEG, cognition, emotion, and peripheral physiology in young and old adults. Scientific Data, 6, 180308.
